courses.title: Obstetrics & Gynecological Nursing
outcomes: Explain physiological and psychological changes during pregnancy, labor, postpartum, and neonatal stages.
Demonstrate antenatal assessment, intrapartum monitoring, and essential newborn care (ENC).
Formulate care plans for high-risk pregnancies, preeclampsia, postpartum hemorrhage (PPH), and maternal complications.
Apply family planning counseling, reproductive health education, and gynecological disorder management.

courses.title: Advanced Clinical Practicum I
outcomes: Synthesize comprehensive medical-surgical, emergency, and obstetric clinical skills in high-volume hospital units.
Demonstrate independent nursing decision-making, patient prioritization, and multidisciplinary care coordination.
Apply infection control, patient safety protocols, and therapeutic communication under clinical preceptorship.

courses.title: Senior Seminar & Professional Nursing Issues
outcomes: Analyze nursing legislation, Pakistan Nursing Council (PNC) regulations, and ethical practice standards.
Evaluate contemporary issues in healthcare policy, nursing autonomy, advocacy, and workforce development in Pakistan.
Formulate professional career development plans and continuing nursing education (CNE) pathways.

courses.title: Nursing Research Project I
outcomes: Execute approved research methodology, data collection, and statistical analysis for an undergraduate thesis.
Synthesize findings, draw clinical conclusions, and write a formal academic research report.
